title: [10min/16MB] TrigramHash + EMA-SWA + Int4 QAT — val_bpb 1.2219
author: Ashutosh3142857

data.description: Adds a 3-token hashed context embedding table alongside BigramHash to capture richer token co-occurrence patterns.
Uses an 11th transformer layer funded by int4 compression savings.

novel_contributions: TrigramHash(2048, dim=48) to extend bigram context features to 3-token windows
EMA-SWA with alpha=0.9 to weight later warmdown checkpoints more heavily
Int4 QAT on the MLP using STE fake quantization
Using int4 savings to fund an 11th transformer layer
